actions: Added src/guidance to workspace members in root Cargo.toml
Fixed context_providers.rs: removed unused uuid import, fixed mock_retrieve &mut to &self

Fixed decision_engine.rs: removed non-existent imports (safety_framework, modes), added GuidanceMode enum, removed duplicate DetailLevel, derived Copy for enums, removed unused CommandRiskLevel import
Fixed evidence_framework.rs: changed .collected.is_empty() to .collected().is_empty() (3 occurrences), .pending to .pending(), .missing to .missing()
Fixed recommendation_framework.rs: added Display impl for RiskLevel, fixed test borrow issues by cloning returned references
Fixed timeline.rs: added & borrow to pattern matches for move types
Ran cargo fix on crate (auto-formatting fixes applied)
Fixed test_context_snapshot_summary: changed val.key to val.label in summary format string
Fixed test_expert_mode_minimal / test_low_confidence_minimal_detail: changed min_detail_level default from Standard to Minimal
Fixed test_silent_mode_no_guidance: added should_interrupt = false in Silent mode case
Fixed test_evidence_not_sufficient: added missing_count > 0 check in is_sufficient()
Fixed safety_framework.rs: requires_confirmation() → false (all risk levels use warnings, no explicit confirmation)
Fixed regex backreferences in wikilabs-knowledge: xml.rs (removed </\1> backreference, added closing tag stripping)
Fixed regex backreferences in wikilabs-knowledge: html.rs (removed </h\1> backreference, added per-level HEADING_N_RE patterns)
Workspace build succeeds, all 871 tests pass
